name: Timer & Pomodoro
description: Large centered countdown digits. Circular progress ring. Session/break auto-switch. Session history log. Custom interval settings. Sound + haptic alerts. Focus stats chart.

psychology_triggers.name: Cognitive Ease
psychology_triggers.implementation_mandate: Enforce Cognitive Ease prominently in the main user flow.
psychology_triggers.anti_pattern: Ignoring Cognitive Ease leads to high drop-off rates in this specific industry.

psychology_triggers.anti_pattern: Ignoring Endowed Progress Effect leads to high drop-off rates in this specific industry.
